source_records.source_quote: Test scores are due with the application by December 1, 2025, and will be considered during the Prescreen process.
The Duolingo English Test is the only exam accepted; TOEFL and IELTS are not accepted. There is no minimum score required to apply.
Applicants submit the online application, recommendations, résumé, essay, transcripts, repertoire list, personal photo, and prescreen materials when required.
All students who audition and are admitted to MSM are automatically considered for scholarships.
Undergraduate majors may audition virtually; most master's applicants may audition virtually, while doctoral and Artist Diploma auditions are live.
A strong audition is the primary factor in the decision process for admission to Manhattan School of Music.
